new_results.echocardiogram: EF 30-35% (unchanged). New finding: moderate mitral regurgitation not documented on prior echo from November 2025. No significant pericardial effusion. Mildly dilated left atrium.

overnight_events: Patient received IV Furosemide 80mg x2 doses overnight per protocol. No acute events. Slept in intervals. Denies chest pain. Reports dyspnea improving — able to lie flat with one pillow vs. two at admission.
nursing_notes: Bilateral lower extremity edema improved from 2+ to 1+ at knees. Lung exam with decreased crackles at bases bilaterally. Patient ambulatory to bathroom independently. Appetite fair — ate 60% of dinner. Patient expressed anxiety about going home alone, asked about home nursing.

case_management_update.home_health_referral: initiated for visiting nurse and home PT if patient discharged to home
case_management_update.social_work_note: Patient lives alone, daughter in Boston. Patient open to short-term rehab if needed.
